author: Awhile
text: doctor convergence target is being deleted — drop it. Target #3 (src/bin/bl-delivery.rs fn doctor() + the §16 audit bl-0ec3 enumerating worktree territory) is removed by bl-a38e (spec burn bl-77a7). One fewer call site to converge: drop the fn doctor()/bl-0ec3 references and converge only the surviving worktree_path/binding_territory sites.

author: Tweeting
text:
Converge work/<id> branch derivation onto delivery::work_branch helper

Lift the duplicated format!("work/{id}") branch literal out of the two surviving delivery call sites (bl-delivery.rs run() and prime()) into one delivery::work_branch(id) helper alongside worktree_path, so the (worktree_path, branch) pair derives from one place. Pure refactor, no behavior change; makes §11 claimant-keying a single-helper edit. Third site (doctor/bl-0ec3) was already removed by bl-a38e.
